entities.name: Product Evaluation Criteria
entities.context: V's framework of five questions for evaluating products

entities.name: User Agency
entities.context: Principle that products should respect user control and autonomy

entities.name: Genuine Context
entities.context: Capturing real context about a person beyond surface-level data like resumes

entities.name: Differentiation
entities.context: Clarity of how a product stands apart from alternatives

relationships.context: Respecting user agency is one of the five evaluation criteria
Capturing genuine context is one of the five evaluation criteria
Clear differentiation is one of the five evaluation criteria
